title: Draper 85354 30W Soldering Iron , Blue
features: • Soldering irons complete with metal stand and 1.1 meter cable and approved plug
• Provides a stable and constant temperature for all soldering tasks

description: Product Description Draper soldering irons complete with metal stand and 1.1M (approx.) cable and approved plug. The 30W soldering iron provides a stable and constant temperature for all soldering tasks. Fully assembled and ready to go out of the box. Fitted with easily replaceable soldering tips. A great soldering iron to have around the home or garage, designed for electronic and automotive applications. Voltage: 230 volts. Box Contains 30W Soldering Iron
